entry.title: La Habra, California Search Engine Optimization

link.title: La Habra, California Search Engine Optimization

entry.content:
Are you looking for more visitors or clients in the La Habra, California area?

Making sure that your able to find customers in your area is important.

Optimizing your website so that it get’s found in searches is a must.

When you optimize your website for search engines the likely hood of your website being listed for multiple searches increases.

Search Engine Optimization Services
entry.summary: La Habra, California Website Search Engine Optimization. Make sure your website pops up when people go do searches in your area.

entry.content:
Made A New Page For My Daily Posts

Building More pages added daily posts page: Daily Posts

Making A Graphic For My Website Offer at the Bottom of My Homepage

Designed a graphic for an offer I have on the bottom of my homepage. The offer is for a website with free domain, server space, and 3 - 5 custom pages.

entry.title: La Habra California Website Design Services

link.title: La Habra California Website Design Services

entry.content:
La Habra Website Design Services

Hello, my name is Ruben Gutierrez and I'm a website designer in the La Habra, California area. Are you looking to get some work done on your website?

Hello, My name is Ruben And I Provide In the La Habra, California area.

Below are some of the services that I can help you with.

If you can completely

Teaching

When you succeed so do I, for that reasons I enjoy providing information for free. Feel Free to reach out to me at rubengutierrezwebdesign@mail.com

Search Engine Optimization

Make sure your that your La Habra, California Business Get's Found by optimizing your website for search engines.

Application Development

Do you need a personal application for your business?

Teaching

When you succeed so do I, for that reasons I'm willing to

Why Have A Website?

Website are very useful tools that can help you get found.

WordPress Websites

WordPress website. WordPress optimization.

Consultation

Consultation controlling creating killed

Website Design

Not satisfied with the way college controlling

Graphic Design

Bring your services to life with customized graphics.

entry.content:

entry.content:
Adding more templates to my website.

Customizing My Sass File

I’ve been customizing my CSS classes to focus on building my interface quicker.

I feel like in the past I tended to use a lot of CSS to get my website to look exactly how I wanted but that always made it hard to
entry.summary: Fixing Things, Getting to know my website better. Submitting my website to Google Search Console.

entry.title: Getting Familiar With New Website, Submitting Website To Google

link.title: Getting Familiar With New Website, Submitting Website To Google

entry.content:
I’m still getting used to this new website.

Submitted My Website To Google Search Console

Today I spent some time making adjustments to my DNS files. In order to get my website on Google faster I’m going to have to add some files that prove that I’m the owner of my domain ‘ruben-gutierrez.com’
entry.summary: Fixing Things, Getting to know my website better. Submitting my website to Google Search Console.

entry.title: Writing More Content For My Jekyll Website, Improving the About Me Page

link.title: Writing More Content For My Jekyll Website, Improving the About Me Page

entry.content:
Today I decided that I’m going to be working on improving the about me page on my site.

Changing to Resume Style Rather Than A Portfolio Look

I’m going to be trying to make it look more like a resume than a portfolio, kind of of the same thing but not really.

How It’s Changing

I’m going to really focus on being descriptive about my skill level and what it is exactly I know how to do.
entry.summary: I'm going to be trying to make it look more like a resume rather than a portfolio, kind of of the same thing but not really.

entry.title: Using Porkbun, Jekyll, Github, and Vercel To Build & Deploy My New Website

link.title: Using Porkbun, Jekyll, Github, and Vercel To Build & Deploy My New Website

entry.content:
Hello! it’s been a while, I’m back! You’ll find some of the things that I’ve been up too recently.

Vercel, Jekyll, Porkbun, and Github

I’m making a new website so I’ve decided to use the technologies above to build it and deploy it.

Learning More About DNS FIles

I’ve decided to host DNS files are interesting and a must if you’re ever going to get good at hosting and deploying websites.

I spent some time today learning about TXT files and

Interesting Thing I’ve learned Today

Venezuelan Oil powered the tanks that defeated Hitler.
entry.summary: Buying my domain from Porkbun deploying my website using Vercel and Github to Deploy my new website. What I'm planning on doing.
